About: It is about a Danish rock/pop music duo.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Eurovision Song Contest 2000.
ConsistsOf: It consists of brothers Jørgen and Niels Olsen.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by winning the Eurovision Song Contest 2000.
IsA: It is a Danish rock/pop music duo.
It is a musical duo formed by brothers.
KnownAs: It is known as Brødrene Olsen.
KnownFor: It is known for winning the Eurovision Song Contest 2000.
It is known for the song "Fly on the Wings of Love".
OccurredAt: It occurred at the K.B. Hallen.
UsedIn: It is used in the musical Hair.
